description: Petition in Judaeo-Arabic from Yaʿqūb b. Abū l-Yaman to the Nagid. The writer was sick for 8 months and is hiding at home because of the capitation tax. Now a holiday is approaching and he is asking for help. On the back is a short account.
tags: illness: poverty, illness: marad, capitation tax, jaliya, illness letter 969-1517, Appeal, tax, Illness
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
